description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and runs a before_script that installs bash, curl, wget, aria2 via apk and makes linux_downloader.sh executable. All jobs run in the default test stage and include: all_test runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test; all_torrent runs ./linux_downloader.sh --torrent; archlinux_iso runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --iso --archlinux then ./linux_downloader.sh --iso --aria2 --parallel 5 --archlinux; archlinux_torrent runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --torrent --archlinux then ./linux_downloader.sh --torrent --archlinux; debian_iso runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --iso --debian then ./linux_downloader.sh --iso --aria2 --parallel 5 --debian; debian_torrent runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --torrent --debian then ./linux_downloader.sh --torrent --debian; fedora_iso runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --iso --fedora then ./linux_downloader.sh --iso --aria2 --parallel 5 --fedora; fedora_torrent runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --torrent --fedora then ./linux_downloader.sh --torrent --fedora; kali_iso runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --iso --kali then ./linux_downloader.sh --iso --aria2 --parallel 5 --kali; kali_torrent runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --torrent --kali then ./linux_downloader.sh --torrent --kali; opensuse_iso runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --iso --opensuse then ./linux_downloader.sh --iso --aria2 --parallel 5 --opensuse; opensuse_torrent runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --torrent --opensuse then ./linux_downloader.sh --torrent --opensuse; tumbleweed_iso runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --iso --tumbleweed then ./linux_downloader.sh --iso --aria2 --parallel 5 --tumbleweed; tumbleweed_torrent runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --torrent --tumbleweed then ./linux_downloader.sh --torrent --tumbleweed; ubuntu_iso runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --iso --ubuntu then ./linux_downloader.sh --iso --aria2 --parallel 5 --ubuntu; ubuntu_torrent runs ./linux_downloader.sh --test --torrent --ubuntu then ./linux_downloader.sh --torrent --ubuntu. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined, so all jobs execute on every pipeline run.
